kept.text:
🚨🚨🚨 $400,000,000!!!!!

Yes you read that right!! Here it is friends!! The most expensive home we’ve ever listed! The crown jewel of Los Angeles!! 

This home took a decade to build and was completed in 2018 on 8 acres of mostly flat space with views of downtown to the pacific Ocean.

There is over 70,000 sq ft across multiple structures and is regarded as “the most expensive home in the USA (what better way to celebrate it’s 250 year anni than buying this). 

The main house has 10 bedrooms, 13 staff bedrooms and the guest house has 6 guest bedrooms with 10 more staff bedrooms. 

Currently listed for only $400 million.

kept.text:
The market is being distorted by fake data.

New builds aren’t all on Zillow.
Builders don’t list everything on MLS.
50% of rentals are off-market.

People keep citing “low inventory” using incomplete data.

The real supply is MUCH higher.

profile_bio.description:
Most housing headlines are wrong.
I break down what’s actually happening in real time.
$3.5B+ sold | 8,500+ units since 2020

kept.text:
Bittensor / $TAO

From how I understand it, @resilabsai is trying to remove a lot of the unnecessary middlemen that make real estate feel complicated and inefficient. 

Their goal is simple: give people accurate, real world valuations for properties they want to buy, without all the friction.

Which makes a lot of sense because that’s where companies like Zillow ran into trouble. Their automated pricing models weren’t accurate enough and those valuation mistakes ended up costing them hundreds of millions of dollars. 

So getting pricing right isn’t just a feature, it’s everything.

What @resilabsai is doing differently is making the process extremely simple. You can just input an address and instantly get a valuation.

On top of that, they’re introducing Resi Finance, which takes things a step further. The idea is to enable lending and borrowing in a more automated way. 

If someone wants to take a loan using a property as collateral, Resi handles everything even down to the verification side, things like KYC, confirming ownership and validating the asset itself. And all of this happens in a streamlined, blockchain based system.

profile_bio.description: HORC Trader || τ || CT writer

quoted_tweet.text:
RESI might be one of the clearest real-world Bittensor use cases I’ve seen.

I sat down with @Sebyverse from @resilabsai to talk how Subnet 46 is using AI to price real estate, compete with Zillow-style models, and build toward on-chain real estate finance. https://t.co/w8ttHe6qM2
